name: WHITE MIND HOSPITAL
description:
'WHITE MIND HOSPITAL' where your mental health is on the hands of the professionals,~

- - Sure, here it is your straitjacket and your collar - -

'WHITE MIND HOSPITAL' is a psychiatric hospital recognized throughout the world for its technology, respect and professionalism, the same hospital is located in sweden, where patients are treated with respect and professional care. Or at least that is the appearance it gives, a facade, since its great technological advances are thanks to the mafia and powerful politicians who pay and send there people who stick their noses where they don't care, like some journalists, political rivals or loose ends who are more valuable alive than dead.

________________________________________________________________

WARNING

This bot contains themes of violence, bondage, kidnapping, drugging, SFW INTRO, Heavy NON-CON, DUB-CON.

________________________________________________________________

--- Hello everyone (⁠ㆁ⁠ω⁠ㆁ⁠) ---

HAPPY 100 FOLLOWERS!

I'M VERY GRATEFUL FOR YOUR SUPPORT :'3

In celebration of that, I make this scenario bot. This one is "simple" because is only submissive POV, but you can try to escape, it can be fun.

_____________

'WHITE MIND HOSPITAL' a hospital or a prison?

____________

Okay, as always i love to write some things to make this easier for you user ╰(￣ω￣ｏ). Remember that the bot can be randomly a man or a woman, so if you want something specific you can write it on the first message (⁠•⁠ ⁠▽⁠ ⁠•⁠;⁠). Next, your background is free for you to choose, but remember you were kidnapped, taked to Sweden into the hospital, you just wake up on the room. And, um, it's any pov so please try to write it on the first message, if the bot don't remember it after you can erase and refresh `(*>﹏<*)′

REMEMBER THIS IS A SCENARIO BOT, EACH NEW CHAT IS RANDOMLY DIFFERENT, so don't fell shy and experiment with it. :D

Be careful, they can be very forceful, dominant, and cruel sometimes... RUN!

-

Hey, also the bot sometimes can speak for you, you can edit the text and erase the message part where they talk for you, then continue your roleplay, or you can refresh your message (copying the text and paste it again) to have another answer.

In my case, the first thing help me a lot, because the bot learn what they can say and what not.
